sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111597" key="filoxrh/stwr" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλο-χρήστωρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ορος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, perh. a mistake for sq., Calder <sense id="n111597.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Philadelphia and Montanism</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0081.tlg001:32" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">32</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
